name: Air Conditioning
description: Climate control in all premium rooms
long_description: Split-type air conditioners in all premium and semi-private rooms ensure a comfortable temperature year-round. Units are serviced monthly.

name: High-Speed WiFi
description: Fiber optic 1 Gbps internet throughout the hostel
long_description: Fiber optic broadband connection with 1 Gbps speed. Dual-band WiFi routers on every floor ensure seamless connectivity in all rooms and common areas.

name: Natural Lighting
description: Large windows in every room for fresh air and sunlight
long_description: All rooms feature large windows that provide ample natural light during the day and cross-ventilation for fresh air circulation.

name: Premium Bedding
long_description: Each resident is provided with a high-quality foam mattress, hypoallergenic pillow, and fresh bedding set. Bedding is washed weekly.

name: Dining Hall
description: Spacious dining area serving 3 meals a day
long_description: Our spacious dining hall can accommodate 50+ residents. We serve breakfast, lunch, and dinner daily with a rotating menu featuring both Bangladeshi and continental dishes.

name: Common Kitchen
description: Fully equipped shared kitchen with microwave, stove & utensils
long_description: Self-service common kitchen equipped with gas stoves, rice cookers, microwave ovens, refrigerators, and all essential cooking utensils. Residents can cook their own meals anytime.

name: Fitness Center
description: Modern gym equipment open 6 AM - 10 PM
long_description: Our on-site fitness center is equipped with modern cardio and strength training equipment. Open daily for all residents.

name: Entertainment Room
description: Smart TV, gaming consoles and comfortable seating
long_description: Dedicated entertainment room with a 55-inch Smart TV, gaming consoles (PS5, Xbox), board games, and comfortable seating for residents to unwind.

name: Study Lounge
description: Quiet, air-conditioned study environment with desks
long_description: A dedicated quiet zone with individual study carrels, group study tables, whiteboards, and high-speed WiFi. Open 24/7 for residents who need a focused study environment.

name: Power Backup
description: 24/7 generator backup for uninterrupted power supply
long_description: Diesel generator with automatic transfer switch ensures uninterrupted power supply during load shedding. All rooms, WiFi, and common areas remain powered.

name: 24/7 Security
description: CCTV surveillance and on-site security personnel around the clock
long_description: Comprehensive security system with 24/7 CCTV monitoring, biometric access control at all entry points, and trained security personnel on-site at all times.

name: Laundry Service
description: Washing machines and dryers available on every floor
long_description: Self-service laundry facilities with washing machines and dryers on each residential floor. Detergent and fabric softener available at the front desk.

name: Rooftop Terrace
description: Open-air rooftop with city view and seating
long_description: Our newly added rooftop terrace offers panoramic views of Sylhet city. Furnished with outdoor seating, it's the perfect spot for evening relaxation or group study sessions.

name: Parking
description: Secure parking for bicycles and motorcycles
long_description: Covered parking area with CCTV surveillance for bicycles, motorcycles, and small vehicles. Bike racks and designated motorcycle spots available.

name: Prayer Room
description: Clean and quiet prayer facility for all residents
long_description: A dedicated prayer room on the ground floor with separate areas for male and female residents. Carpeted, air-conditioned, and maintained in pristine condition.

name: Housekeeping
description: Daily cleaning of rooms and common areas
long_description: Professional housekeeping team cleans all common areas daily. Room cleaning is provided weekly with optional additional cleaning on request.
